description: Simplified form for requesting a birth certificate copy or registration support.

help.english: Enter the child's full name as it should appear on the certificate.
help.telugu: Certificateలో ఉండాల్సిన child పూర్తి పేరు టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: Certificate में जैसा नाम चाहिए, बच्चे का पूरा नाम लिखें.

help.english: Select the child's date of birth.
Choose the gender as per hospital or official record.
help.telugu: Hospital లేదా official record ప్రకారం gender ఎంచుకోండి.
help.hindi: Hospital या official record के अनुसार gender चुनें.

help.english: Enter hospital name, home, village, town, or city where the birth happened.
help.telugu: Birth జరిగిన hospital, home, village, town లేదా city పేరు టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: Birth जहाँ हुआ, वह hospital, home, village, town या city लिखें.

help.telugu: Parent 10 అంకెల mobile number టైప్ చేయండి.
help.hindi: Parent का 10 अंकों का mobile number लिखें.

help.english: Upload hospital birth slip or discharge summary if available.
help.telugu: Hospital birth slip లేదా discharge summary ఉంటే upload చేయండి.
help.hindi: Hospital birth slip या discharge summary हो तो upload करें.

help.english: Upload parent Aadhaar or other ID proof.
help.telugu: Parent Aadhaar లేదా ID proof upload చేయండి.
help.hindi: Parent Aadhaar या ID proof upload करें.

english: What should I enter for place of birth?
hindi: birth place mein kya likhna hai?
